parsed.production_notes: The video uses a single static AI-generated image as a base, with only the characters' mouths and slight facial movements animated. Hands holding objects are distorted, and the background is completely frozen.

characters.appearance: Elderly Indian woman with a deeply wrinkled face, grey hair, and a thin build. She has a fair to wheatish complexion.
characters.wardrobe: Greyish-brown patterned traditional dress with a bright orange dupatta over her head. Multiple silver bangles on both arms.

characters.appearance: Young Indian woman with dark hair tied back and a fair complexion.

scenes.setting: Rural desert village at golden hour, featuring a dirt path, mud huts, and camels.

panels.panel_visual_description: An elderly woman sits on a woven cot in a rural desert setting, holding a smartphone. A younger woman stands beside her, holding a microphone towards her. The background features a dirt path, mud huts, and resting camels under a warm, golden-hour sky. The composition is static, with warm, natural-looking lighting.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows an interview setup in a desert village. The elderly woman is seated on a cot, holding a phone, while a reporter stands beside her with a microphone. The background has huts and camels. The video has a static, AI-generated look with only facial animation.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Hello beta, how are you? How is the weather in Delhi? Are you eating properly? Don't skip your meals. [Hello child, how are you? How is the weather in Delhi? Are you eating properly? Don't skip your meals.]
Character B says: दादी, आप वीडियो कॉल पे इंग्लिश में बात कर रही हो? [Grandma, are you talking in English on a video call?]
Character A says: अरे बेटी, बूढ़ी हूँ तो क्या हुआ? दिमाग तो अभी भी चलता है। [Oh daughter, so what if I am old? My brain still works.]
Character B says: दादी मुझे बताइए, ये इंग्लिश आपने सीखी कहाँ से? इस उम्र में? [Grandma tell me, where did you learn this English? At this age?]
Character A says: बेटी, मेरा पोता दो साल पहले दिल्ली गया पढ़ाई के लिए। वहाँ उसने इंग्लिश मीडियम स्कूल ले लिया। अब जब फोन आता है तो पोता इंग्लिश में बात करता है। मुझे समझ नहीं आता था। एक दिन मेरे पोते ने बोला, दादी इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप है, ट्राई करो। मैंने बोला बेटा इस उम्र में इंग्लिश? पोता बोला, दादी उम्र से क्या होता है? रोज़ 15 मिनट दो। [Daughter, my grandson went to Delhi two years ago for studies. There he enrolled in an English medium school. Now when he calls, he talks in English. I couldn't understand. One day my grandson said, Grandma there is an English Seekho app, try it. I said son, English at this age? Grandson said, Grandma what does age matter? Give 15 minutes daily.]
Character B says: और आपने ट्राई किया? [And did you try?]
Character A says: हाँ बेटी, एक रुपया का ट्रायल था। सोचा एक रुपया में क्या जाएगा, डाउनलोड किया। एक्सपर्ट्स हैं उसमें, छोटे वीडियो में हिंदी में समझाते हैं। स्पोकन इंग्लिश शो है, बिल्कुल बेसिक्स से। मैं रात को सोने से पहले एक-दो वीडियो देखती थी। और बेटी एक एआई कोच है उसमें, उससे मैं चैट करती थी। पहले तो टाइप करना भी नहीं आता था ढंग से। धीरे-धीरे सीखा। एआई कोच से बोली, हाउ टू टॉक टू माय पोता? उसने सिखा दिया, हाउ आर यू डियर? डिड यू ईट? टेक केयर ऑफ योरसेल्फ। मैंने प्रैक्टिस की। गलत बोलती थी, सुधार देता था। बार-बार गलत बोलती थी, फिर से सुधार देता था। कभी नहीं बोला, दादी आप छोड़ो आपकी उम्र नहीं है। एआई कोच से कोई शर्म नहीं है बात करने में। रात के 10 बजे सब सो जाते हैं, मैं एआई कोच से प्रैक्टिस करती थी। [Yes daughter, there was a one rupee trial. Thought what will I lose in one rupee, downloaded it. There are experts in it, they explain in Hindi in short videos. There is a spoken English show, right from the basics. I used to watch one or two videos before sleeping at night. And daughter, there is an AI coach in it, I used to chat with it. Initially, I didn't even know how to type properly. Slowly I learned. I told the AI coach, how to talk to my grandson? It taught me, how are you dear? Did you eat? Take care of yourself. I practiced. If I spoke wrong, it would correct me. If I spoke wrong repeatedly, it would correct me again. It never said, Grandma you leave it, it's not your age. There is no shame in talking to the AI coach. At 10 PM everyone goes to sleep, I used to practice with the AI coach.]
Character B says: अब क्या फर्क पड़ा? [What difference did it make now?]
Character A says: अब पोता फोन करता है तो मैं खुद बात करती हूँ। डॉक्टर के प्रिस्क्रिप्शन समझ आते हैं। किसी पे डिपेंड नहीं करती। पोता कहता है, दादी आप तो मुझसे अच्छी इंग्लिश बोलती हो। मैं कहती हूँ बेटा, मेरे पास इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप है। तो बेटी, अगर ये 70 साल की दादी सीख सकती है, तो तुम तो बच्चे हो। इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करो। एक्सपर्ट के वीडियो देखो, एआई कोच से प्रैक्टिस करो। उम्र से कुछ नहीं होता, हिम्मत से होता है। [Now when my grandson calls, I talk myself. I understand doctor's prescriptions. I don't depend on anyone. My grandson says, Grandma you speak better English than me. I say son, I have the English Seekho app. So daughter, if this 70-year-old grandma can learn, then you are kids. Download the English Seekho app. Watch expert videos, practice with the AI coach. Age doesn't matter, courage does.]

panels.panel_visual_description: A smartphone is displayed centrally against a plain white background.

scenes.visual_description: A smartphone appears on screen displaying the app logo. A green install button is positioned below the phone.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: तो इंस्टॉल बटन पे क्लिक करो और इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [So click on the install button and download the English Seekho app.]

scenes.visual_description: A solid black screen displaying a lengthy white text disclaimer.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Disclaimer
English Seekho kisi bhi government authority, institution, brand, organisation ya individual ke dwara endorsed, sponsored, affiliated ya associated nahi hai. Kisi bhi names, trademarks, logos ya references ka use sirf educational aur informational purposes ke liye kiya gaya hai. Kuch content sirf samjhane ke liye dramatised ya representational ho sakta hai. English Seekho kisi bhi guaranteed results ka promise nahi karta. Outcomes individual effort aur doosre factors par depend karte hain aur vary kar sakte hain.
